## Sensitive Information Guardrail

Do not include personal health information, regulated data, restricted datasets, credentials, private keys, confidential screenshots, private source code, legal advice, or medical/audiology advice. Use synthetic descriptions or public examples when possible.

## Suggested Safer Wording Or Behavior

If the concern is about public copy, paste a safer alternative here.
